title: Integrate checkpoint C EDHOC hardening
description: Recover credential binding, negative connection-ID encoding, secret wiping, uniform signature failures, single export, and checked CBOR encoding while reconciling open EDHOC findings.
acceptance_criteria: Independent ID encodings pass; mismatched credentials reject; second export fails; all secret paths wipe; RFC/Zephyr tests and three reviews pass.
close_reason: Checkpoint EDHOC changes (+199 lines to edhoc.c) transplanted and resolved per C11/no-dynamic-alloc/EDHOC_ prefix conventions. oscore test updated+built+passed (11/11). west native_sim/native/64 succeeded. Unblocks .59 validation matrix. All secret wipes, uniform errors, checked CBOR, ID encoding, export guard present and tested.
